purpose: Signed follow intent payload between peer nodes.
producer: Node owner wallet through node UI

domainFields.name: name
domainFields.note: Protocol signing domain name. It binds signatures to epress world and prevents cross-app reuse.

domainFields.name: version
domainFields.note: Typed-data schema version. Verifiers must match this value to avoid cross-version ambiguity.

domainFields.name: chainId
domainFields.note: Chain context in the EIP-712 domain separator. It adds replay isolation across chain environments.

messageFields.name: followeeAddress
messageFields.note: Address of the node being followed. Receiver validates this as its own identity anchor.

messageFields.name: followeeUrl
messageFields.note: Canonical URL of the followee node used during follow handshake and profile verification flow.

messageFields.name: followerUrl
messageFields.note: Canonical URL of the follower node. Receiver fetches /ewp/profile from this origin to bind signer and endpoint.

messageFields.name: timestamp
messageFields.note: Unix timestamp used for freshness checks (one-hour window) to resist replay attacks.

purpose: Signed unfollow intent payload between peer nodes.
producer: Node owner wallet through node UI

domainFields.name: name
domainFields.note: Protocol signing domain name. It binds signatures to epress world and prevents cross-app reuse.

domainFields.name: version
domainFields.note: Typed-data schema version. Verifiers must match this value to avoid cross-version ambiguity.

domainFields.name: chainId
domainFields.note: Chain context in the EIP-712 domain separator. It adds replay isolation across chain environments.

messageFields.name: followeeAddress
messageFields.note: Address of the followed node in the relationship to be removed.

messageFields.name: followerAddress
messageFields.note: Address of the follower authorizing unfollow. Must match recovered signer.

messageFields.name: timestamp
messageFields.note: Unix timestamp used for freshness checks (one-hour window) to prevent replay.

purpose: Signed profile update payload broadcast to connected peers.

domainFields.name: name
domainFields.note: Protocol signing domain name. It binds signatures to epress world and prevents cross-app reuse.

domainFields.name: version
domainFields.note: Typed-data schema version. Verifiers must match this value to avoid cross-version ambiguity.

domainFields.name: chainId
domainFields.note: Chain context in the EIP-712 domain separator. It adds replay isolation across chain environments.

messageFields.name: publisherAddress
messageFields.note: Owner address of the profile being updated. Must match path address and recovered signer.

messageFields.name: url
messageFields.note: Updated canonical node URL propagated to peers for future protocol interactions.

messageFields.name: title
messageFields.note: Updated public node title replicated across peer caches.

messageFields.name: description
messageFields.note: Updated public node description replicated across peer caches.

messageFields.name: timestamp
messageFields.note: Monotonic profile version timestamp. Peers apply update only when newer than local copy.

purpose: Signed proof of source for publication replication.

domainFields.name: name
domainFields.note: Protocol signing domain name. It binds signatures to epress world and prevents cross-app reuse.

domainFields.name: version
domainFields.note: Typed-data schema version. Verifiers must match this value to avoid cross-version ambiguity.

domainFields.name: chainId
domainFields.note: Chain context in the EIP-712 domain separator. It adds replay isolation across chain environments.

messageFields.name: contentHash
messageFields.note: Content hash of the original publication. Followers use it to request the exact source payload.

messageFields.name: publisherAddress
messageFields.note: Publisher identity that signs source authenticity for network-wide verification.

messageFields.name: timestamp
messageFields.note: Publication timestamp used for deterministic ordering and replication request context.

purpose: Signed comment confirmation payload for Ethereum-auth comments.

domainFields.name: name
domainFields.note: Protocol signing domain name. It binds signatures to epress world and prevents cross-app reuse.

domainFields.name: version
domainFields.note: Typed-data schema version. Verifiers must match this value to avoid cross-version ambiguity.

domainFields.name: chainId
domainFields.note: Chain context in the EIP-712 domain separator. It adds replay isolation across chain environments.

messageFields.name: nodeAddress
messageFields.note: Target node address where the comment exists. Prevents signature reuse across nodes.

messageFields.name: commenterAddress
messageFields.note: Wallet address expected to own and confirm this comment.

messageFields.name: publicationId
messageFields.note: Publication identifier that scopes the comment confirmation intent.

messageFields.name: commentBodyHash
messageFields.note: Hash of stored comment body. Server recomputes and compares to prevent payload tampering.

messageFields.name: timestamp
messageFields.note: Comment creation timestamp used with short validity window for anti-replay protection.

purpose: Signed installation payload used by web installer bootstrap.

domainFields.name: name
domainFields.note: Protocol signing domain name. It binds signatures to epress world and prevents cross-app reuse.

domainFields.name: version
domainFields.note: Typed-data schema version. Verifiers must match this value to avoid cross-version ambiguity.

domainFields.name: chainId
domainFields.note: Chain context in the EIP-712 domain separator. It adds replay isolation across chain environments.

messageFields.name: node
messageFields.note: Install-time node profile payload (address, URL, title, description, avatar) used to seed self identity.

messageFields.name: settings
messageFields.note: Install-time settings payload used to bootstrap default runtime configuration.

messageFields.name: timestamp
messageFields.note: Installation request timestamp validated in a bounded window to prevent replay.

purpose: Signed comment deletion request payload for Ethereum-auth comments.

domainFields.name: name
domainFields.note: Protocol signing domain name. It binds signatures to epress world and prevents cross-app reuse.

domainFields.name: version
domainFields.note: Typed-data schema version. Verifiers must match this value to avoid cross-version ambiguity.

domainFields.name: chainId
domainFields.note: Chain context in the EIP-712 domain separator. It adds replay isolation across chain environments.

messageFields.name: nodeAddress
messageFields.note: Target node address where deletion is authorized.

messageFields.name: commentId
messageFields.note: Comment identifier requested for deletion.

messageFields.name: commenterAddress
messageFields.note: Wallet address that must match both comment author and recovered signer.
